creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 166874
Patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates devel/visualparadigm to 13.0 build 20160203

This is a simple upgrade, no pkg-plist changes.

New features can be seen here (although no specific changes are mentioned for this specific build):

http://www.visual-paradigm.com/whats-new/


Attached poudriere logs for {9.3,10.2}amd64
